# BriQ
### High Density Breakout Box
[ Contact Sales ](https://www.scalinq.com/solutions/briq/#contact-form)
[ Explore Models ](https://www.scalinq.com/solutions/briq/#briq-models)

## BriQ – High Density Breakout Box
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/non-magnetic-512px.png)
Fully Non-MagneticA fully non-magnetic design from end to end﻿.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/cropped-cropped-puzzle-512px.png)
Cryostat AgnosticDeveloped for the Bluefors attenuator block and also available for other form factors.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/cropped-BriQ-transparent-2.png)
A 24-pin breakout box for high-density attenuator blocks. BRIQ is developed to allow easy integration of existing components into high-density cryostats. The assembly is delivered complete and is easily plugged into the attenuator block with a click and fastened with screws.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/assembled-4-512px-1.png)
Fully AssembledShipped pre-assembled for easy and instantaneous plug-in.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/hand-wire-512px.png)
Hand-FormableWires can be easily shaped and reshaped by hand.
## Highly Flexible Setups
### Plug directly into HD wiring
Designed to fit directly to 24-pin high-density wiring and attenuator blocks. 
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Compatible-with-HD-wiring-scaled.jpg)
### Customize to your needs
Each line can be customized with a variety of cable types, lengths and connectors. Made to fit perfectly with your setup.
![](https://www.scalinq.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Briq-carousella-scaled.jpg)
## Highly Flexible Setups

Designed to fit directly to 24-pin high-density wiring and attenuator blocks.

### Customize to your needs
Each line can be customized with a variety of cable types, lengths and connectors. Made to fit perfectly with your setup.
